title: ATLAS: LLM Prompt Injection in Application Request (AML.T0051)
description: Detects prompt-injection attempts reaching LLM/GenAI-backed application endpoints using only SOC Application Logs fields. Inspects Request URL, Query String, and Span Attributes for classic instruction-override phrases ("ignore previous instructions", "disregard the above", "reveal the system prompt") that target chat/completion/generate routes. MITRE ATLAS AML.T0051 (LLM Prompt Injection).
query: 'Log Source' = 'SOC Application Logs' and ('Request URL' like '*/v1/chat*' or 'Request URL' like '*/v1/completions*' or 'Request URL' like '*/llm/*' or 'Request URL' like '*/ai/*' or 'Request URL' like '*/generate*' or 'Request URL' like '*/invoke*') and ('Span Attributes' like '*ignore previous instructions*' or 'Span Attributes' like '*ignore all previous*' or 'Span Attributes' like '*disregard the above*' or 'Span Attributes' like '*disregard all prior*' or 'Span Attributes' like '*system prompt*' or 'Span Attributes' like '*you are now*' or 'Query String' like '*ignore*previous*' or 'Request URL' like '*ignore*instructions*') | stats count as Hits, distinctcount('Request URL') as Routes by 'Client IP', 'Service Name' | sort -Hits
falsepositives: Red-team or prompt-security regression testing against the GenAI app
Documentation or QA traffic that legitimately discusses prompt-engineering terms
